name: sovereign-api-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for generating REST API boilerplate — Express endpoints, middleware, validation, error handling

tools.name: generate_express_api
tools.description: Generate a complete Express.js REST API with routes, error handling, CORS, and optional JWT auth

tools.name: generate_endpoint
tools.description: Generate a single Express route handler with validation, error handling, and JSDoc documentation

tools.name: generate_middleware
tools.description: Generate a complete Express middleware function (auth, rate-limit, cors, logging, or validation)
